expected_base: f6a71e2 Add Glass Reader cumulative reveal history v1
purpose: Replace floaty Glass Reader dev controls with stable production view modes and make the glass ticker use the native output sample clock as its timing authority.
changes: Simplify controls to Read, Ticker, Inspect, Free, Reset View, Play, Stop, Refresh.
Constrain OrbitControls and disable damping drift outside Free mode.
Pass native playback clock time into HfieldVolumetricPacketField.
Use authoritative clock time for scan plane, cumulative reveal boundary, and PMUT/ticker readout when playback is active.
Prevent requestAnimationFrame motion timing from racing native output playback.
Increase clock polling cadence for tighter output sync.
production_rule: Read mode is stable, Ticker focuses glass timing, Inspect owns diagnostics, Free is the only exploratory orbit.
